title: TesLearn
description: An AI-powered learning platform built for engineering students that transforms lectures, notes, and study materials into personalized learning experiences using LLMs and intelligent search.
problem: Engineering students often spend hours searching through lengthy lectures, scattered PDFs, and handwritten notes before they can actually start studying. Existing learning platforms provide content but fail to personalize it or make it easily searchable.
solution: Built TesLearn to centralize the entire learning experience. The platform uses AI to generate structured notes, quizzes, lecture summaries, personalized roadmaps, and semantic search, allowing students to learn faster instead of wasting time finding resources.
features: AI-generated notes from lecture videos and PDFs
Semantic search across lectures and study materials
AI-powered quiz generation with explanations
Personalized learning roadmap for every student
Video summarization using Large Language Models
Authentication and user progress tracking
Asynchronous AI task processing using Celery and Redis
Scalable REST APIs built with FastAPI
learnings: Designed scalable asynchronous AI pipelines using Celery workers.
Learned how to optimize LLM calls for cost, latency, and response quality.
Built production-ready backend APIs with authentication and role-based access.
Implemented efficient caching and background processing to improve user experience.
Gained experience integrating AI features into a real-world SaaS product.
metrics: AI-powered study workflow from lectures to revision
Built using a scalable microservice-inspired backend architecture
Designed for thousands of concurrent student users

title: MakeFunnyMemes
description: An AI-powered meme generation platform that transforms user ideas into engaging, high-quality memes using Large Language Models and image generation techniques.
problem: Creating engaging memes often requires creativity, editing skills, and significant time. Many users have funny ideas but struggle to turn them into polished, shareable content.
solution: Built an AI-powered platform that generates memes from simple text prompts. By combining LLMs with customizable templates and image processing, users can create entertaining memes in seconds without any design experience.
features: AI-powered meme generation from text prompts
Multiple meme templates and caption styles
Instant image generation and editing
One-click sharing and downloading
Responsive modern UI
Cloud-based image storage
Fast API-driven backend architecture
learnings: Designed AI workflows that balance creativity with fast response times.
Learned prompt engineering techniques to improve meme quality and humor.
Built scalable backend APIs for AI-powered content generation.
Optimized image delivery and storage for a smooth user experience.
Improved frontend performance for real-time AI interactions.
metrics: Optimized for fast image generation and sharing

title: OpenTrek
description: A full-stack trekking platform that connects adventure enthusiasts with verified trekking organizers, making it easy to discover, join, and manage trekking experiences across India.
problem: Adventure enthusiasts often rely on scattered WhatsApp groups and social media pages to discover trekking events. This makes it difficult to find trusted organizers, compare upcoming treks, and manage registrations in one place.
solution: Built OpenTrek as a centralized platform where trekking organizers can publish events and trekkers can explore destinations, view trek details, register online, and connect with trusted communities through an intuitive web experience.
features: Browse and discover upcoming trekking events
Organizer dashboard for creating and managing treks
Secure user authentication and authorization
Cloudinary-powered image uploads
Responsive UI optimized for desktop and mobile
Detailed trek pages with schedules, pricing, and difficulty levels
User registration and profile management
RESTful backend APIs built with Express.js
learnings: Designed and developed a complete MERN stack application from scratch.
Implemented secure authentication using JWT and protected routes.
Integrated Cloudinary for efficient image storage and delivery.
Improved API design and database modeling using MongoDB.
Focused on creating a responsive and intuitive user experience.
metrics: Responsive across desktop and mobile devices
